findings.description: Section s2 merges two distinct source structures: (1) the major `==`-underlined heading '設定ファイル例(JNDIを使用してデータベース接続を行う場合)' and (2) its nested `--`-underlined '設定内容詳細' subsection. The s2 title '設定内容詳細' is taken from the subsection, omitting the JNDI-identifying context. A title such as '設定ファイル例（JNDIを使用してデータベース接続を行う場合）' would better represent the section's primary topic for AI retrieval.
